name: Excluding one group token forces solver to pick alternate group
description: Same source/sink as group-mint-pure-simple-001 but excludes group 0x4332's token. Solver must find alternate group for minting. Verifies solver flexibility: finds group 0xeb61 instead. Tests excludedToTokens interaction with group minting.
notes: Achieves full 1 CRC. Solver finds group 0xeb61 as alternate when 0x4332 is excluded.
